source_file: April 23 2026 Rithmic soak run summary; raw vendor capture not committed

extraction_range.source_window: representative warmup, active candidate, fill, management, gap, and rebuild states

redaction_statement: No credentials, account identifiers, Rithmic vendor packets, Databento records, or proprietary raw captures are included. Runtime-derived events are synthetic OBS-01 records shaped from the soak-state requirements.
coverage_notes: Includes warmup FEED and post-gap BOOK_REBUILD states.
Includes active strategy candidate, risk, sizing, simulated fill, position, and management lifecycle facts.
Includes ORDER_INTENT as the causal parent for SIM_FILL even though OBS-00 acceptance focuses on rendered fill output.
